brief.rationale: SMS body exceeds 160 chars — should fail channel_char_limits only.

email.subject_b: Maya's tandoori cauliflower — early access tonight
email.body: Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak is here, {{first_name}} — and it's not asking for permission. Smoke, char, coconut-yogurt finish — the fork works overtime. Not a kit. Just dinner — already cooked. [Add to plan]({{short_url}})

sms.body: Hey {{first_name}}, Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak just landed and it's not asking for permission — smoke, char, coconut-yogurt finish and a fork-hand that's about to work overtime, two minutes to plate, full at four, no takeout night required. Tap → {{short_url}}

push.title: Maya's cauliflower steak just landed
push.body: Tap to add it before Sunday's cutoff.
